bio.Recent_Position: Marketing and Business Development Intern at Bright Future Consulting, Inc., Remote
bio.Bios: What's up! My name is Patrick Tu and I initiated in my fall quarter of my freshman year here at UCI. In my free time, I enjoy all kinds of outdoor activities and a wide variety of music. A fun fact about myself is that I was born in Shanghai, China. Ask me about streetwear/sneakers at recruitment!
